author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Fix #601: capture both stdout AND stderr in error messages from git_{commit_in_cache_with_args,in_cache} (both shared_writer/core.rs and sync/core.rs — 4 sites total). New format: 'git ... in cache failed (<exit>):\nstdout: <stdout>\nstderr: <stderr>'. Side effect: the 4 existing 'nothing to commit' substring guards in core.rs (lines 318, 416, 506, 976) now actually fire — they were dead code because err_str came from empty stderr. Added 2 regression tests in shared_writer/tests.rs. Tests: 2866 pass (2 new). Clippy clean -D warnings.
